titleStmt.title: SII 4.1302: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1302. (A.R. No. 389 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakava¨rṣamu jata
koṇḍrūrustalacaṁdraśēkharuṇḍaniyiṇḍu
kī¨rtticcalāṁ caṁdrikāṁ śaśvadviśvavisāriṇīṁ vitanutē rājadvijānāṁ cayaḥ . . śākābdānāṁ pra
māṇē nidhinayanaviyaccaṁdragē sa pradīpaṁ saṁkrāṁtyāṁ vaiṣuvatyāmavitathavaca
nō rājataṁ lōhaga¨rbbhaṁ śrībhīmēśāya nutyā tribhuvanaguravē śrīcatu¨rggēhajāta
prādādācaṁdratārasthiramamalayaśāṁ vennapā¨ryyassudhī¨ryyaḥ [. 2*] svasti . samastabhuva
nāśraya śrīpritivīvallabha mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka raviku
latilaka cōḍakulaśēkhara pāṇḍyakulāṁtaka samastarājāśraya rājarājēṁdra vīrama
hēṁdra vikramacōḍa vijayābharaṇa rājakēsariva¨rmmape¨rmmanaḍigalu gaṁggākavērī
va¨ryyaṁtatharitrīpati saptamōviṣṇuva¨rddhanulaina tribhuvanacakrava¨rtti śrīkulōttuṁ
ggacōḍadēvara prava¨rdhamānavijayarājyasaṁvatsaraṁbulu 37 dina 389 ṇḍu viṣuvusaṁkrāṁ
tinimittamuna koṇḍrūri maṇḍaya koḍuku śrīkulōttuṁggacōḍadēvaraku mrokkina nālu
vaṇḍavennaya śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvarakuṁ beṭṭina veṇḍigaṭṭina lōhadiviya 1 . dīniki
nācaṁdra¨rkkamu neyu vōyaṁgalavārugā śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvara kilaramuna prōlabōla
nāvaya kāṭabōla nāvaya badabōla meṁṭa neṟiyacadukana jakkaya berasinavāru
vūṁṭagāṁ dalarāsi nāvayakoḍuku Eṟiyabōyini vasamuna
ḍi vōyaṁgala tribhuvanāṁkkuśa nē māneṁ
Digital edition of SII 4.1302 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
